creator: freebsd@moosefs.com
text:
Created attachment 155423
Ports for MooseFS Netdump 2.0.61-1

The new port sysutils/moosefs-netdump: MooseFS Netdump version 2.0.61-1. 

We created totally new (and official) ports and we want to become the ports maintainer.

In attachment is a tarball containing ports tree for MooseFS Netdump.
